posts.text: Best no-code algo platform for MCX commodities? (Streak alternatives) — Hi everyone, I want to automate my short-term MCX trades through Zerodha. Streak still doesn’t support the MCX segment. Even though I can build custom bots in Python, I’m looking for a pure, reliable no-code platform right now so I don’t have to manage the backend infrastructure. I’m looking at Tradetron, but I want to get your thoughts before paying for a subscription and API fees. Does anyone use Tradetron or another no-code platform for MCX with Kite? I mainly need: Stable MCX execution with minimal slippage Easy no-cod…
